**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 17 stories (UX foundation 6 + C2/Platform 6 + Perf/Determinism 5) + plan tasks S36-01 to S36-11

## Automated Tests Required

### UX 036-05 — C2 Frame Budget Additional Capture + Notes (Integration)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Bridge/C2PanelBindTimingTests.cs` (extend); `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Bridge/PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- C2 panel selection bind path completes under 100 ms wall (p95)
- C2 proxy filters 1–18 (incl. new frame notes) remain PASS (≥ prior counts)
- Headless bind regression guard vs S35 baseline
**Edge cases to cover**:
- Profiler unavailable (Linux CI) → explicit doc limitation + Stopwatch fallback
- No sim or DelegationBridge changes (ZERO touch verified)
**Estimated test count**: Reuse/extend existing + 1-2 new timing asserts. ReplayGolden 6/6 required.

### C2 036-01 — C2 Additional Onboarding + Frame Notes Tooltips (UI)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Bridge/C2CommsOnboardingTests.cs` (extend filter)
**What to test**:
- New frame context / onboarding filters in C2 checks
- C2 filters 1–13 (61/61) + extensions PASS post USS/UXML
**Edge cases**: Zero prior knowledge NPE; comms legend non-color cues.

### C2 036-02 — Platform C–H Validation Polish Extend (Config/Data)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Validation/`, `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Platform/PlatformLinkCatalogTests.cs` + siblings (PlatformComms, PlatformImportPanel)
**What to test**:
- ValidationReport deterministic ordering + golden unchanged
- Extended LINK/COMMS/DAMAGE messages surface in viewer + diff
- CatalogWriteGate extend-only (grep + test no mutation)
**Edge cases**: Invalid fixtures roundtrip; schema 010+ frozen.

### C2 036-04,05,06 and similar UI — existing filters (PlatformLinkCatalogTests, PlatformImportPanelTests, PlatformCommsTests, C2CommsOnboardingTests)
Extend counts only; no new hot paths.

### Perf 036-01 — Determinism Audit P1 Follow-up (Logic)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Decision/DecisionLogTests.cs`; `src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/Sensors/DatalinkSidePictureMergerTests.cs`; `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Baltic/BalticReplayHarnessWorldHashTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- ChronologicalEntries + fingerprint SHA256 identical pre/post (per sim-core-time GDD)
- SimWorldHash / DetectionWorldHash combine deterministic
- No new non-det (unordered iter, wall-clock, RNG domain reuse)
**Edge cases to cover**:
- Fixed seed double-run on baltic-patrol* : WORLD_HASH, FINGERPRINT identical
- Datalink share lag ordering matches sensor-detection-ew GDD + ADR-004
- GitNexus CRITICAL symbols (DecisionLog, DatalinkSidePictureMerger, BalticReplayHarness) noted planning only
**Estimated**: 3-5 new/strengthened asserts. `/replay-verify` gate.

### Perf 036-05 — Replay Golden + Harness Maintenance (Logic)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Baltic/ReplayGoldenSuiteTests.cs`; `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Baltic/BalticReplayHarness*.cs`
**What to test**:
- 6/6 ReplayGolden PASS (baltic-patrol, comms, classify, stale, spoof, readiness)
- Harness A vs B + A vs golden bit match; improved divergence reporting
- Production `tests/regression/replay-golden-*.txt` unchanged
**Edge cases**: Isolated regression golden for polish (does not touch 6/6); clear first-mismatch tick output.

### Perf 036-10 — DecisionLog Immutable Hash + P1 Polish (Logic)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Decision/OrderLogReplayFingerprintSha256Tests.cs`; `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Decision/DecisionLogTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Chrono + SHA256 identical vs S35-10 on golden fixtures
- Append paths (policy/engage/contact/magazine) produce identical fingerprint
- No LINQ OrderBy / per-tick allocs in hot fingerprint path (P1)
**Edge cases**: Multiple append types in fixed order; Release alloc profile ≤ S35-10.

### Perf 036-15 — Datalink Merger GitNexus Planning + Re-audit (Integration)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/Sensors/DatalinkSidePictureMergerTests.cs`; harness datalink tests
**What to test** (planning + verify only; NO code):
- Sort contracts + lag application deterministic (observer/sensor/target)
- GitNexus context/impact captured for Datalink* + callers (BalticReplayHarness)
- Replay on datalink fixtures (baltic-patrol-datalink-*) match golden
**Note**: Explicit "planning only — no edits" in evidence.

### Perf 036-20 — Perf Re-Profile + Replay-Verify Gate (Config)
**Test file path**: N/A (pure bench + doc in `production/perf/perf-profile-polish-baseline-2026-06-19.md`)
**What to test**:
- ReplayGolden timing re-recorded
- Full sln Release + tick-rate table
- Post-S36 appendix + explicit replay-verify gate reinforcement
**No code changes**.

**S36-01 re-baseline + plan tasks**: Full `dotnet test` (Release) ≥1204; ReplayGolden 6/6; C2 18/18 proxy; GitNexus @ tip recorded; ZERO Delegation diff.

*If no formula found in referenced GDD — test cases derived from acceptance criteria + boundary (sim-core-time hash/tick, sensor-detection-ew Pd).*

## Manual QA Checklist

### UX 036-01 — Accessibility Requirements Sign-off (Config)
**Verification method**: Lean doc review + sign-off record
**Who must sign off**: team-ui + qa-lead
**Evidence to capture**: Updated story or `production/qa/accessibility-signoff-s36-*.md`; linked C2 signoff
Checklist:
- [ ] `design/accessibility-requirements.md` sections 1–8 present + internally consistent (Standard tier table for C2/Platform)
- [ ] Cross-links to art-bible, interaction-patterns, c2-command-post, game-concept resolve (no dangling)
- [ ] C2 surfaces (drawer, OOB, topbar, staging) + Platform hosts listed as Standard
- [ ] WCAG AA contrast notes + non-color cues validated vs art-bible
- [ ] No code changes introduced
- [ ] Lean review CONCERNS resolved or APPROVED

### UX 036-02 — Interaction Patterns Polish + Crosslinks (UI)
**Verification method**: Doc audit + pattern coverage
**Who**: team-ui
Checklist:
- [ ] Pattern index (P-C2-01..P-PE-03) covers implemented Phase 1 screens (drawer tabs, selection sync, COMMS, import staging)
- [ ] Cross-refs to accessibility, art-bible, command-and-control-ui, difficulty-curve present and resolve
- [ ] Hosts referenced (C2LeftDrawerPanelHost, PlatformImportPanelHost etc.)
- [ ] No new patterns for out-of-scope (Cesium, badges)

### UX 036-03 — Difficulty Curve Validation + Playtest Tie-in (Config)
**Verification method**: Doc + playtest cross-ref
**Who**: team-qa + designer
Checklist:
- [ ] Bands A/B/C map to baltic-patrol* + Platform workflow documented
- [ ] Playtest notes (fun-hypothesis-validation-2026-06-19.md + human/) referenced; gaps noted without new scope
- [ ] Cross-links to game-concept, polish-boundary, interaction-patterns
- [ ] No production hash/fixture change

### UX 036-04 — Art-Bible Lean Review and Sign-off (Config)
**Verification method**: Lean AD-ART-BIBLE sign-off
**Who**: art-lead / team-ui
Checklist:
- [ ] Sections (visual identity, mood, palette with WCAG, tokens, layout, NATO) complete for C2/PE
- [ ] Colorblind safety + planning/executing states align accessibility
- [ ] Cross-links to UX/GDDs; references only to unity UI (no binary edits)
- [ ] Status updated to APPROVED or APPROVED WITH NOTES

### UX 036-05 / C2 036-01 etc — see automated + evidence

### C2 036-03 — Live C2/Platform Presentation Evidence Refresh (Visual/Feel)
**Verification method**: Screenshot + lean sign-off (headless primary)
**Who**: team-unity / team-qa
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/*` PNGs + README + `sprint-36-presentation-evidence-*.md`
Checklist:
- [ ] All protocol READMEs + PNG labels updated for new tooltips, frame notes, LINK/COMMS/DAMAGE
- [ ] Headless filters PASS rate ≥ S35 (document delta)
- [ ] Invoke-C2PlayMode... or equivalent log clean (or deferral noted)
- [ ] S35 placeholders cross-ref updated

### Similar for other UI/Config: translate each AC to concrete falsifiable item (e.g. "Tooltip for LatencyMsNominal visible on hover in catalog viewer"; "Notes column in staging shows full validation findings without truncation").

### Perf stories (Logic/Integration) — minimal manual beyond report review + hash immutable confirm (via replay-verify output).

*Subjective language supplemented by benchmark (16.67 ms, <100 ms bind) or playtest protocol.*

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint:

1. Game / harness launches; full-solution re-baseline (S36-01): `dotnet test -c Release` ≥1204 PASS; GitNexus tip recorded; indexed commit captured.
2. New / replay session: ReplayGoldenSuiteTests 6/6 (all baltic-patrol variants) + `/replay-verify` PASS; production Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` bit-identical.
3. Primary mechanic (C2 path): C2 headless proxy 18/18 maintained (PlayModeSmoke|C2Selection|OobTree|...|PlatformLinkCatalog filters 61/61 + 58/58) after all UI/tooltip changes.
4. System regression risk (frame/perf): C2 panel bind <100 ms p95 (or residual documented); Unity frame vs 16.67 ms captured in `unity-c2-frame-baseline-s36-*.md`.
5. Save/load not applicable (headless/replay focus); data roundtrips (Platform workbook) deterministic + extend-only.
6. Performance within budget (no new spikes): ReplayGolden elapsed stable; full sln CI time documented.
7. Polish gates: ZERO DelegationBridge diff; CatalogWriteGate extend-only (gitnexus impact + grep); no scope creep (polish-boundary refs).
8. Evidence + docs: smoke doc produced (`production/qa/smoke-sprint-36-*.md`); all Must-Have tasks ACs met.

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check sprint`. Reference this list. Sprint fails if C2 18/18 or Replay 6/6 or hash drifts.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|---------------|--------------|--------------------|
| UX 036-03 + UX sign-offs (S36-03) | Validate difficulty bands + fun hypothesis update for accessibility/patterns/art-bible polish | 1 (structured) | NPE + mid-game (Baltic) |
| UX 036-05 + C2 036-01 (S36-07) | Frame baseline UX impact + onboarding/frame-notes tooltip comprehension | 1 (think-aloud) | New + experienced within Baltic slice |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes written to `production/playtests/playtest-*-s36-*.md` (or playtest-2026-06-*-s36-*.md) and reviewed by designer / qa-lead before story marked COMPLETE. Per plan S36-07.

If no stories require playtest validation: *Advisory only — 1–2 sessions recommended for UX + frame per S36-07 and UX-03 tie-in. Use existing S35 corpus as baseline.*

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path (or harness extended) for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document / sign-off exists for all Visual/Feel , UI and Config stories (lean doc updates acceptable)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (C2 18/18, ReplayGolden 6/6, hash, full sln baseline maintained)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via /code-review or documented peer review); GitNexus + scope-check equivalent passed
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via /story-done)
- [ ] S36 plan gates met: QA plan merged (this file) before S36-03+; UX sign-offs + art-bible AD complete; frame captured; evidence extended; perf/det no drift
- [ ] Production/qa/ + playtests/ + perf/ artifacts updated for residuals
- [ ] All within polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md (no creep)

---

**Next steps**:
- Share this plan with the team before sprint implementation begins
- S36-01 re-baseline first
- Maintain `/replay-verify`, gitnexus impact, C2 proxy, hash discipline on every change
- Once implemented: `/smoke-check sprint` then manual + playtest per sections
- For Logic/Integration: ensure tests updated before /story-done
